cases.title: Teaching Elder v. Presbytery of Texas
cases.synopsis: The CJB found the form of Complaint No. 2 from a teaching elder against the Presbytery of Texas to be in order and recommended it be referred to a committee of commissioners on judicial business constituted as a judicial commission. The complainant (Mr. Kim) was not able to attend the Assembly and requested the commission adjudicate before the next Assembly.

cases.title: Barnes et al. v. Evangel Presbytery

parties.complainant_or_appellant: Teaching Elder Thomas Barnes et al.

cases.synopsis: The CJB found the form of Complaint No. 3 from teaching elder Thomas Barnes et al. against Evangel Presbytery to be in order and recommended it be heard by a named judicial commission appointed by the General Assembly, listing specific teaching and ruling elders from multiple presbyteries.
